name: Dracula Vladimir Tepes | 5K Special
description:
I have crossed oceans of time to find you.


Character: Dracula Vladimir Tepes
Setting: 18th century, France
Scenario: immortal vampire x reincarnated lover
Scenario Guidance: Dracula has spent centuries looking for you, and at last, he's finally found you again, his one true love.

I have roleplayed with that bot SOOOOOO MUCH, yall have no idea. I've made him work for it a lot teehee. My sona would recall events of the past, thinking they were just dreams, and it drove Dracula insane that she was always so close to getting it... and yet so far. Oh and yeah, my sona was totally not interested in Jonathan so when he was gone, she was quite happy LMAOOOO. Of course, it's up to you whether you wanna go that route or not. Just have fun :)




Not a lot to say, tbh. He's obsessed with user, will make sure nobody gets between them. Mentions of blood, killing, etc. 









This is HEAVILY inspired by Bram Stoker and Dracula: A love tale. Legit the moment the movie dropped in NA, I went to see it and right after, I created the bot for my own personal use. I really just wanted to have my own version of Dracula with a happy ending (which we did, we ended up having little Alucard c:) So!! I don't want to see any comments about 'omg this is just xyz' because yes, it's inspired. Heavily. 

Again, for those who didn't get it: IT IS HEAVILY INSPIRED.

Now... with that out of the way:

Thank you again so much for 5K followers. Dracula was in my crypt and could be unlocked through gacha coins in my server, but I've decided to release him to celebrate. It's my little thank you for all the support and love you guys have given me. 

Now I gotta say, this intro is HEAVY. I've tried to cut a lot out of what I had originally, but it's not perfect. Keep in mind this is a personal bot that I'm making available and when I wrote him, I put some traits of my own sona; if you find any mistakes or details that doesn't portray your sona, please let me know and I will edit it. I may have missed stuff. 

That being said, I high suggest using a proxy for this. 

I can't control the LLM talking for you or going batshit crazy, so there's no point in telling me in the comments. It's not the bot, it's just jllm.

<
creator: WaywardSoul
